title: The Mysterious Disappearance of Brian Grocki

scenes.text: A 14-year-old vanishes without a trace, leaving behind unanswered questions.
This mysterious case unfolded in Lansing, Michigan, in 2004.
Brian was last seen on a spring evening, with no leads for years.
Despite extensive searches, Brian's fate remains unknown.
scenes.label: NEVER FOUND
scenes.sub: The mystery persists to this day.

scenes.text: Follow for a new mystery every day.

description: 📍 Lansing, USA - 2004. 14-year-old Brian Grocki vanished without a clue, igniting a decades-long search that yields no answers. Follow for daily mysteries!
